title: cleistes latiglossa var. alba
intro: Cleistes latiglossa var. alba is a variant of the Cleistes latiglossa orchid species, which is known for its unique and delicate white flowers. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. Cleistes latiglossa var. alba is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and boosting the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
